title: Game Club: 30XX
description:
Game Club is like a book club except we pick a game to play each month and then meet up to discuss it with a focus on game design.  This month's game is the roguelite action platformer, 30XX! We will be meeting virtually on Discord this month (in the general voice chat). Come share your thoughts on the game with us!

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see:https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313482156/

title: Gamedev Work Night
description:
St. Louis County Library Clark Family branch is hosting casual work time for local game developers in the Creative Lab. Bring your project to work on and talk with other devs for feedback or fun. This is open to EVERYONE ages 14 and up. 

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313609455
location: St. Louis County Library - Clark Family branch - 1640 South Lindbergh Blvd - St. Louis, MO, us
